ratings.comment: Fine guy.  Teaches you the worst class at UW Madison.  The university must drop this class it doesn't help students at all and gives an unnecessary workload.  You can't access any of the sources like they say you can.  Just a horrible horrible class.  You can teach the relevant information in 1 class, but now extend it to 16 weeks.  Horrible.
Find another professor at any means necessary

This guy almost seems to try and annoy students on purpose by not excusing absences, assigning tons of homework, and trying to find the littlest things to mark wrong. It seems like all genbus360 professors here want to lecture about business communication, yet none of them have actually worked in the business world. By far the worst professor here
